revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Remove file prefix/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Remove file prefix/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Remove file prefix/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Remove file prefix/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Remove file prefix/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Remove file prefix/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} This template removes the ''File:'' and ''Image:'' prefixes from file names.
'''Examples'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|File:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''FILE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|FILE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Image:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Image:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''IMAGE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|IMAGE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Other:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Other:Example.svg}}'''
''This technically works for any valid namespace, but is rarely needed there:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Portal talk:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Portal talk:Example.svg}}'''
''It will also strip interwiki links:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':Commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:Commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:Example.svg}}'''
''However, it will fail for more complicated situations:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:File:Example.svg}}'''
=== See also === {{string-handling templates|trim}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:String manipulation templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} This template removes the ''File:'' and ''Image:'' prefixes from file names.
'''Examples'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|File:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''FILE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|FILE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Image:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Image:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''IMAGE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|IMAGE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Other:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Other:Example.svg}}'''
''This technically works for any valid namespace, but is rarely needed there:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Portal talk:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Portal talk:Example.svg}}'''
''It will also strip interwiki links:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':Commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:Commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:Example.svg}}'''
''However, it will fail for more complicated situations:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:File:Example.svg}}'''
=== See also === {{string-handling templates|trim}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:String manipulation templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

{{Documentation subpage}} This template removes the ''File:'' and ''Image:'' prefixes from file names.
'''Examples'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|File:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''FILE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|FILE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Image:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Image:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''IMAGE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|IMAGE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Other:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Other:Example.svg}}'''
''This technically works for any valid namespace, but is rarely needed there:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Portal talk:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Portal talk:Example.svg}}'''
''It will also strip interwiki links:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':Commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:Commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:Example.svg}}'''
''However, it will fail for more complicated situations:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:File:Example.svg}}'''
=== See also === {{string-handling templates|trim}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:String manipulation templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} This template removes the ''File:'' and ''Image:'' prefixes from file names.
'''Examples'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|File:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''FILE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|FILE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Image:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Image:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''IMAGE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|IMAGE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Other:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Other:Example.svg}}'''
''This technically works for any valid namespace, but is rarely needed there:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Portal talk:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Portal talk:Example.svg}}'''
''It will also strip interwiki links:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':Commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:Commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:Example.svg}}'''
''However, it will fail for more complicated situations:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:File:Example.svg}}'''
=== See also === {{string-handling templates|trim}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:String manipulation templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} This template removes the ''File:'' and ''Image:'' prefixes from file names.
'''Examples'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|File:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''FILE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|FILE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Image:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Image:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''IMAGE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|IMAGE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Other:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Other:Example.svg}}'''
''This technically works for any valid namespace, but is rarely needed there:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Portal talk:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Portal talk:Example.svg}}'''
''It will also strip interwiki links:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':Commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:Commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:Example.svg}}'''
''However, it will fail for more complicated situations:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:File:Example.svg}}'''
=== See also === {{string-handling templates|trim}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:String manipulation templates]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23573030467|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} This template removes the ''File:'' and ''Image:'' prefixes from file names.
'''Examples'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|File:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''FILE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|FILE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Image:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Image:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''IMAGE:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|IMAGE:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Other:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Other:Example.svg}}'''
''This technically works for any valid namespace, but is rarely needed there:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''Portal talk:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|Portal talk:Example.svg}}'''
''It will also strip interwiki links:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':Commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:Commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>'''commons:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|commons:Example.svg}}'''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:Example.svg}}'''
''However, it will fail for more complicated situations:''
<nowiki>{{remove file prefix|</nowiki>''':sv:File:Example.svg'''}} → '''{{remove file prefix|:sv:File:Example.svg}}'''
=== See also === {{string-handling templates|trim}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:String manipulation templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
